title: Travel Gift Box
description: Which travel‑themed gift boxes can be purchased in France that include a hot‑air‑balloon experience, are priced under €200, and can be delivered within metropolitan France?
narrative: The user wants to find gift boxes (e.g., Smartbox) that offer a hot‑air‑balloon flight in France or Europe as a present. Relevant results must mention a hot‑air‑balloon activity, list a price at or below €200, and indicate that the product can be delivered or used in metropolitan France. Documents that do not include the balloon experience, exceed the price limit, or lack French delivery/validity details are not relevant.

title: Mild Lamb Tajine
description: How can I adapt the Lamb Tajine with Vegetables recipe to make it less spicy and suitable for a smaller portion size?
narrative: The user wants a version of the given Lamb Tajine recipe that reduces the heat (e.g., less chili, smaller spice measurements) and scales down the quantity of vegetables to serve 2‑3 people, while preserving the core flavors. Relevant documents include suggestions to halve vegetable amounts, use teaspoon‑level spices, and adjust chili to a “knife point.”

title: Hybrid Car Search
description: What used hybrid cars priced between €10,000 and €20,000 are currently listed on Labonauto for the Rhône region?
narrative: The user wants a list of used hybrid vehicles that meet specific price, fuel, and location criteria. Relevant documents must contain vehicle listings from Labonauto that specify the make, model, year, price, hybrid energy type, and are located in the Rhône (or nearby) region, allowing the user to evaluate and possibly purchase a suitable car.

title: Veau Marengo History
description: What are the historical origins of the Veau Marengo dish and its connection to Napoleon's victory at Marengo?
narrative: The user seeks information that explains the provenance of Veau Marengo, linking the recipe to the 1800 Battle of Marengo and describing how the dish entered French cuisine. Relevant documents should discuss the historical anecdote, dates, military context, and cultural transmission of the recipe, rather than merely providing cooking instructions or contemporary variations.

title: Affordable Sun Visor Deckchair
description: What low‑price two‑person deck chair with an Oxford‑fabric sun visor offers similar features to the Unwritten Aloha model?
narrative: The user wants to locate a deck chair for two people that includes a removable sun visor/awning made of waterproof Oxford fabric, removable pillows, a weight capacity of about 200 kg, wheels for easy movement, and a warranty, but at a lower price than the €169.90 listed for the Unwritten Aloha Transat. Relevant documents should describe comparable specifications (size, material, awning dimensions, cushions, delivery options) and provide a price that is equal to or less than the target price, along with information on shipping time, payment options, and return policy.

title: Star Conflict Monetization
description: What in‑game items can be bought with real money in Star Conflict, and how do they influence competitive balance?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of Star Conflict’s free‑to‑play economic model, specifically which cosmetics, equipment, vessels, and account slots are purchasable with real currency, any rank or faction restrictions on these purchases, and whether they provide a gameplay advantage (i.e., pay‑to‑win). Relevant passages are those that describe permanent stickers, MkIII equipment, premium vessels, extra active‑vessel slots, reputation/credit boosters, and the overall impact on progression and balance; generic gameplay or mode descriptions without monetary details are not sufficient.

title: Desa Mid-size Rental
description: What are the most affordable and suitable intermediate (mid-size) car rental options available in Desa, Indonesia?
narrative: The user wants a list of mid‑size (intermediary) rental cars in Desa, Indonesia that meet family‑size needs (5‑seat, luggage space) and are offered by major providers such as Alamo, Europcar, Thrifty, National, Dollar, Budget, Sixt, etc. Relevant documents should include price comparisons, vehicle models (e.g., Toyota Avanza, Corolla, Nissan Sentra), availability of automatic/manual transmission, fuel efficiency, and any stated benefits like no hidden fees or 24/7 service. Only information describing these characteristics and pricing for the Desa location is considered relevant.

title: Family Beach Camping
description: What family‑friendly camping sites near Séné, Brittany, offer a swimming pool, Wi‑Fi, pet‑acceptance, and accommodations for 6‑8 people at a mid‑range price?
narrative: The user wants a campsite in or very close to Séné (Brittany) that can host a family of six to eight. Relevant results must mention the campsite’s proximity to the sea (around 500 m), the presence of an outdoor swimming pool (preferably with slides), Wi‑Fi availability, permission for pets, and housing options that accommodate 4‑8 guests (e.g., mobile homes or cottages). The user also prefers a mid‑range rating (2‑3 stars) and reasonable weekly rates. Documents that provide these details—including facilities, capacity, price or star rating, and location relative to the beach—are considered relevant, while listings that lack the required amenities, are far from Séné, or pertain only to unrelated rentals are not.

title: Resignation Unemployment Eligibility
description: What are the specific conditions that allow a French employee who resigns to pursue a professional project to receive unemployment benefits under the 2019 reform?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the eligibility rules introduced in the June 2019 unemployment insurance reform for resigning employees, including required length of service, renewal frequency, compensation level, and any accompanying support measures. Relevant documents must describe these provisions, the effective date (1 November 2019), and any later updates or clarifications.

title: Charleval Townhouse
description: Looking for a townhouse for sale in Charleval that has a garden, a double garage, and is priced around €150,000, ideal for a young couple.
narrative: The user is interested in residential properties located in Charleval. Relevant documents must describe a townhouse (or similar single‑family dwelling) that includes a private garden and a double garage (or equivalent parking space), is in good or perfect condition, and falls within a price range roughly from €140,000 to €160,000. Listings that mention these features, the exact location (Charleval), and match the budget are considered relevant; other property types, locations outside Charleval, or price points far outside the specified range are not relevant.

title: Kid‑friendly 4x4 RC
description: Which 2021 remote‑controlled 4×4 off‑road car provides the longest battery runtime while staying safe and appropriately fast for children aged 5‑8?
narrative: The user wants a recommendation of a 2021‑model off‑road RC car that is suitable for young children (5‑8 years). Relevant documents should be evaluated for criteria such as: 4×4 capability, maximum speed no higher than about 12 km/h, battery autonomy of at least 30 minutes of continuous play, safe non‑toxic materials, easy‑to‑use remote, and a price point that is reasonable for a child’s toy. Documents describing models that meet or exceed these thresholds (e.g., Silverlit 360, Amicool RC) are relevant, while models aimed at older teens or adults, or those with excessive speed, short run‑time, or complex assembly are not.

title: Resistant Potato Varieties
description: What newly bred potato cultivars exhibit genetic resistance to late blight and other pests, and how do they contribute to reducing fungicide applications?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the latest potato varieties (e.g., Cephora, Passion, Tentation, Maiwen, Kelly, Rackam, Zen, Stronga) that have been developed through breeding programs to carry multiple resistance genes against Phytophthora infestans and other pests. Relevant content should describe the resistance mechanisms, field performance, impact on pesticide/fungicide usage, and any associated agronomic traits such as yield, tuber quality, and suitability for fresh consumption or processing.

title: Twilight Passage Origin
description: What is the source, author, and intended meaning of the lyrical fragment that begins with "Twilight Twilight Blinded by so much havoc…"?
narrative: The user wants to identify the original work (song, poem, or literary piece) that contains the given excerpt, learn who created it, and obtain an interpretation of its themes and imagery. Relevant documents should directly cite the work's title, author/artist, publication context, and provide analysis of the lyrical content.

title: Crapauds Burnout Guide

title: Avatar sequel info
description: What is the official sequel to Avatar: The Last Airbender and how can I watch its seasons, preferably in French dubbed versions?

title: Darmanin Innocence
description: What recent statements, court decisions, and political actions illustrate Gérald Darmanin's claim to the presumption of innocence in the rape investigation?
narrative: The user seeks information that explains how the French interior minister Gérald Darmanin has invoked the legal principle of presumption of innocence while under investigation for rape. Sources that provide context on French law regarding presumption of innocence, media coverage of his statements, and analyses of the impact on his ministerial role are all considered relevant.

title: Molasses Dissolution
description: What is the correct way to mix unsulphured molasses into water for plant feeding, including dosage and frequency?
narrative: The user seeks practical guidance on preparing a molasses solution for gardening: how long water should sit, the amount of molasses per volume of water, how often to apply it, and techniques to ensure the molasses fully dissolves without residue. Documents that describe mixing steps, recommended measurements (tablespoons, teaspoons, cups), application schedules, and tips for achieving a clear solution are considered relevant.

title: Sautéed versus Rissole
description: What are the culinary differences between raw sautéed potatoes and rissole (pre‑boiled) potatoes, and how should each be prepared to achieve the best texture and flavor?
narrative: The user wants a detailed explanation that distinguishes raw sautéed potatoes from potatoes that are boiled then fried (rissole), including the definition of each term, recommended potato varieties, step‑by‑step cooking techniques, temperature and fat recommendations, and practical tips to avoid the potatoes breaking down. Relevant documents must discuss these distinctions, cooking methods, and troubleshooting advice.

title: Ardennes Power Concession
description: What are the terms and responsibilities defined in the 1994 concession contract between the Departmental Energy Federation of the Ardennes (FDEA) and EDF/ENEDIS for low‑voltage (BT) and medium‑tension (HTA) electricity networks?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about the 1994 concession agreement that splits rights and obligations for the BT and HTA electricity networks in the Ardennes, including the roles of FDEA, EDF, and ENEDIS, any subsequent changes (e.g., EDF split in 2008), and relevant contact information. narrative: The user is looking for detailed guidance on purchasing a used vehicle through an online marketplace, including how to use search filters (year, model, price), set up alerts for specific listings, understand credit commitments, and arrange home delivery. title: Storm Community Talk
description: What did residents discuss on 4 June 2021 about the unexpected thunderstorm, their daily activities, and concerns about the curfew and police presence?
narrative: The user is looking for forum posts that mention the June 4, 2021 thunderstorm in detail—including the rain, temperature, and its effect on gardening, home chores (e.g., turning on radiators), and outdoor plans—while also describing the local curfew, the lack of gendarmerie activity, and any related community concerns or personal anecdotes. description: How do I prepare a traditional French béchamel potatoes gratin using Gruyère cheese?

title: Togo Mediation Outlook
description: What are the main obstacles and prospects for achieving a successful mediation of Togo's political crisis?

title: Employment Bonus Eligibility
description: What were the eligibility criteria, income limits, and key dates for the French employment bonus (PEP) from 2014 to 2016?
narrative: The user wants information about the French employment bonus (Prime pour l'Emploi) covering who could claim it, the income ceilings based on household composition, the year‑end cutoff dates, and the planned abolition and replacement of the scheme. Relevant documents must mention the income thresholds (e.g., €20,500 for single, €41,000 for couples), the final year of eligibility (2015 for income received in 2014), the date the bonus was abolished (1 January 2016), and the transition to the new RSA activity aid.
